message: The other day, I found myself in a classic parent-vs-kids showdown in the living room. My pup, Max, had gleefully decided that my son’s homework was the perfect chew toy. Amid the chaos of laughter and shouts, I realized how important it is to keep our home organized and free from potential hazards, furry and otherwise! It’s all fun and games until something gets ruined, right? This little refresher helped me think about our space and what we might need in case of a mishap. Have you ever had a similar moment with your fur babies? 🐶✨
